examples: I can't take my sweater off: I amn't wearing anything else on underneath.

definitions.text: On the underside or lower face.
examples: (Can we add an example for this sense?)
Underneath the water, all was calm.

definitions.text: Under the control or power of.
examples: There was little freedom underneath the Nazi jackboot.
You can have the underneath bunk.
The underneath of the aircraft was painted blue.

definitions.text: A background radio sound track played during a specific announcement or program.
